meta.title: Rogue Firmware Upload in PLC's and Other Field Devices
meta.description:
This is a classic from S4x09 (January 2009) where Daniel Peck, whose was with Digital Bond at the time, shows how the lack of authentication allows firmware and logic to be loaded onto two different example PLC's.

It predates the discovery of Stuxnet in 2010. It discusses the ease in developing worms that spread from PLC to PLC. It was far ahead of its time, and treated mostly as interesting, but not important at the time. Much has changed.
